pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the runtime environment enforces Java 17 strictness.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jsoup dependency from version 1.14.3 to 1.15.3.
Upgrade hutool-all dependency from version 5.8.0 to 5.8.21.
Enable resource filtering in the Maven build configuration to allow property substitution in resource files.
Update project version from 1.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.3 to reflect the release status.

src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.general_idea: Add import for Hutool Props to enable reading configuration properties.
Update author and date format in JavaDoc comment.
Replace length check with isEmpty() for cleaner string validation.
Rename table header column for better clarity.
src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.before: .addHeader("序号", "书名", "作者", "最新章节", "更新");
src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.after: .addHeader("序号", "书名", "作者", "最新章节", "最后更新时间");

src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.general_idea: Add newlines to log output for better readability.
src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.before: Console.log("<== 下载完毕，耗时{}s", NumberUtil.round(res, 2));
src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.after: Console.log("\n<== 下载完毕，总耗时{}s\n", NumberUtil.round(res, 2));

src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/Applicat.general_idea: Load version from config file instead of hardcoding it.
Initialize Props object to read configuration.
Disable full-width character conversion in console table.

src/main/java/work/pcdd/sonovel/util/Sea.general_idea: Refactor import statements to use wildcard imports for java.util.concurrent package.
Update author metadata in class Javadoc comment.
Rename static fields to be more descriptive and add new configuration fields.
Update static initializer to load new configuration properties and adjust default values.
Replace manual exception handling with @SneakyThrows annotation in search method.
Refactor crawl method to use concurrent execution with ExecutorService and CountDownLatch.
Update crawlChapter method signature and implementation to use new field names and logging format.
Update download method to use try-with-resources and new file naming convention.

src/main/resources/config.properties.general_idea: Update the base URL configuration to point to a new domain for the novel website.
Update the search request URL to match the new domain.
Change the default save path from a Windows-specific absolute path to a Unix-style relative path.
Add a configuration property for the file extension of downloaded content.
Increase the minimum crawl interval from 50ms to 5000ms to reduce server load.
Increase the maximum crawl interval from 100ms to 6000ms to reduce server load.
Add a version placeholder property for build-time resource filtering.
